words.def: any place of complete bliss and delight and peace
words.zh: n. 天堂, 上帝, 天空

words.def: a person who possesses great material wealth
words.zh: vt. 有, 懷有, 拿, 進行

words.def: the latter part of the day (the period of decreasing daylight from late afternoon until nightfall)
words.zh: a. 平坦的, 相等的, 連貫的, 均等的, 公平的, 偶數的, 平均的, 平衡的, 恰好的

words.def: any creative group active in the innovation and application of new concepts and techniques in a given field (especially in the arts)
words.zh: n. 貨車, 篷車, 先鋒, 前驅, 前衛

words.def: (Old Testament) Adam's wife in Judeo-Christian mythology: the first woman and mother of the human race; God created Eve from Adam's rib and placed Adam and Eve in the Garden of Eden
